text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It's not first place, but I didn't do so bad.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Hopefully I can be a little less cringe next time.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, cut it out. I hate compliments like that...
choice_data_list:
I mean it! You showed really good judgement
duri—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Agh! Enough! I don't need your commentary.
You're smothering me!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Basically, you're saying I did good for me. Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Not like I care what you think anyway.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Coming in first is the coolest. I'm not gonna leave
things like this.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You can say it depends on me all you want, but
that doesn't mean I know how to win.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Look at you, all confident. Are you being serious
right now?
choice_data_list: I'll do everything I can to help you win.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Well, you said it. Help me win, then.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'll even quit being all flaky. That's the part that
depends on me, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wipe that smug look off your face!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whatevs. I won't lose again, so give it everything
you've got.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: When I say I'm gonna do something, I do it.
